title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Kalshi says CFTC, Michigan orders leave it in ‘impossible position’
summary: Kalshi says CFTC, Michigan orders leave it in ‘impossible position’
briefing: “We are disappointed by this decision and believe it is unfair to Kalshi,” the company’s legal counsel said on X.

title: US freezes $131M in Iran-linked crypto as Middle East tensions rise
summary: US freezes $131M in Iran-linked crypto as Middle East tensions rise
briefing: “US Treasury is committed to disrupting and degrading Iran’s illicit financial activities, including its abuse of digital assets,” US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Tuesday.

title: Bitmine generated $46M from Ethereum staking last quarter
summary: Bitmine generated $46M from Ethereum staking last quarter
briefing: Ethereum staking generated 98% of Bitmine’s revenue last quarter as the company’s pivot from Bitcoin mining gained momentum following its March validator launch.

title: Over 95% of Coinbase’s code is now written with help of AI
summary: Over 95% of Coinbase’s code is now written with help of AI
briefing: Coinbase’s Rob Witoff said the company is leaning more on AI to help with execution, but still needs high-agency humans for judgment and strategy.

title: Three US senators oppose CLARITY Act on ethics grounds with vote expected soon
summary: Three US senators oppose CLARITY Act on ethics grounds with vote expected soon
briefing: Senate Majority Leader John Thune reportedly said the chamber will consider a vote on the crypto market structure bill before Aug. 10, though it’s unclear whether it has enough Democratic support to pass.

title: Velocity raises $38M to build stablecoin treasury infrastructure for enterprises
summary: Velocity raises $38M to build stablecoin treasury infrastructure for enterprises
briefing: Backed by Dragonfly, FirstMark and Coinbase Ventures, the startup is expanding software that helps businesses integrate stablecoins into treasury and payment workflows.

title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
summary: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
briefing: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.

title: DeepMind CEO Says AGI Will Be Bigger Than Electricity or Fire
summary: DeepMind CEO Says AGI Will Be Bigger Than Electricity or Fire
briefing: Demis Hassabis says artificial general intelligence is only a few years away and proposes a new U.S. standards body to test frontier AI models before release.

title: Bitcoin Ticks Up to $64K Following Largest Inflation Slowdown in Six Years
summary: Bitcoin Ticks Up to $64K Following Largest Inflation Slowdown in Six Years
briefing: Consumer prices cooled more than expected in June, yet geopolitical tensions continue to cast a shadow over crypto prices

title: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits
summary: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits
briefing: Moving crypto into a lending protocol or liquidity pool won’t count as a taxable disposal, deferring the charge until a real cash-out.

title: Morning Minute: Saylor's Strategy Hoards Cash, Doesn't Buy BTC
summary: Morning Minute: Saylor's Strategy Hoards Cash, Doesn't Buy BTC
briefing: Strategy’s Bitcoin-buying machine stayed in neutral, while BTC and crypto majors chop and oil spikes ahead of a key CPI print this morning.

title: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
summary: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
briefing: The seized coins landed at the government's custodian, which stops short of a sale but has revived questions about Trump's no-sell pledge.

title: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
summary: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
briefing: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.

title: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
summary: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
briefing: About 200 protesters marched through San Francisco on Saturday, calling on leading AI companies to halt development of more powerful models over concerns about AI safety, jobs, and the environment.

title: New Hampshire Follows Bitcoin Reserve With 'Blockchain Basic Laws' Signing
summary: New Hampshire Follows Bitcoin Reserve With 'Blockchain Basic Laws' Signing
briefing: New Hampshire's newly-signed crypto law introduces protections for users, miners, and stakers within its boundaries.
